title: polyalthia costata
intro: Polyalthia costata, also known as the Indian Mast Tree, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive trunk and branches. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polyalthia costata include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as cough and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
